      -- Since m < n, m = k*q with k < L.

      -- sum_{k<L} v_p(k) = v_p((L-1)!) <= L^2.

      refine Finset.sum_congr (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico rfl (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.log_mono_right hm))) fun k _ ↦ ?_
      rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
      exact Nat.lt_pow_of_log_lt (Finset.mem_Ico.mp ‹_›).2
    
    rw [h_leg P.n (le_refl _), h_leg _ (Nat.sub_le _ _)]
    simp only [f, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.mul_sum]
    
    have h_term (k : ℕ) : (P.M : ℤ) * ((P.n / p ^ k) - ((P.n - P.n / P.M) / p ^ k)) - (P.n / p ^ k) ≥ -(P.M : ℤ) := by
      let x := P.n / p ^ k; let y := (P.n - P.n / P.M) / p ^ k
      have h_diff : x - y ≥ P.n / (P.M * p ^ k) := by
        rw [Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]; apply Nat.div_sub_div_le_div_sub
      calc (P.M : ℤ) * (x - y) - x 
        _ ≥ (P.M : ℤ) * (P.n / (P.M * p ^ k)) - (P.n / p ^ k) := by 
            gcongr; exact h_diff
        _ = (P.M : ℤ) * (P.n / (P.M * p ^ k)) - (P.M * (P.n / (P.M * p ^ k)) + P.n / p ^ k % P.M) := by
            rw [← Nat.div_add_mod (P.n / p^k) P.M, Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul, mul_comm P.M]
        _ ≥ - (P.M : ℤ) := by
            have : (P.n / p ^ k % P.M : ℤ) < P.M := Int.ofNat_lt_ofNat_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (pos_of_mul_pos_right (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero P.initial.card_le_card.ne_zero) P.n.zero_le))
            linarith
            
    rw [← Finset.sum_const]
    refine Finset.sum_le_sum fun k _ ↦ ?_
    norm_cast; exact h_term k

  -- 2. Bound for removed part: removed_val ≤ M * L^2 * π(n)
  have h_removed : (removed.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by
    -- removed elements are those with a prime factor q > n/L
    let big_primes := (Finset.range (P.n + 1)).filter (fun q ↦ q.Prime ∧ q > P.n / P.L)
    have h_le : (removed.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (big_primes.card * P.L^2) := by
      rw [Multiset.map_filter, Multiset.sum_filter, Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join, 
          Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]
      gcongr
      -- Sum over I bounded by sum over all m < n with large prime factor
      let all_bad := (Finset.Ico 1 P.n).filter (fun m ↦ m ∉ (P.n/P.L).smoothNumbers)
      apply le_trans (Multiset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (fun x hx ↦ by
         rw [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hx; rw [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico]; exact ⟨⟨by omega, hx.2⟩, (Multiset.mem_filter.mp hx).2⟩))
      -- Map m -> (q, k) where q is largest prime factor. q > n/L. k = m/q < L.
      -- Since n > L^2, q > sqrt(n), so q is unique.
      trans ∑ q ∈ big_primes, ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 P.L, (k * q).factorization p
      · apply Finset.sum_le_sum_of_ne_zero
        intro m hm h_ne
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, mem_smoothNumbers, not_forall, not_le] at hm
        obtain ⟨q, hq_prime, hq_dvd, hq_large⟩ := hm.2
        have h_q_mem : q ∈ big_primes := by
          rw [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]; exact ⟨⟨lt_succ_of_le (le_of_dvd (by omega) hq_dvd), hq_prime⟩, hq_large⟩
        have h_k : m / q ∈ Finset.Ico 1 P.L := by
          rw [Finset.mem_Ico]; constructor
          · exact Nat.div_pos (le_of_dvd (by omega) hq_dvd) hq_prime.pos
          · apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul; calc m < P.n := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hm.1).2
            _ = (P.n / P.L) * P.L + P.n % P.L := (Nat.div_add_mod _ _).symm
            _ ≤ (P.n / P.L) * P.L + P.L := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ P.hL_pos) 
            _ < q * P.L := by apply mul_lt_mul_right P.hL_pos; exact hq_large
        refine Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _) h_q_mem ?_
        refine Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _) h_k ?_
        rw [Nat.mul_div_cancel' hq_dvd]
      · rw [Finset.sum_comm]; apply Finset.sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum fun q hq ↦ ?_
        -- v_p(kq) = v_p(k) since p <= L < q
        have h_q_gt_p : p < q := lt_of_le_of_lt hp (by rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hq; linarith [hq.2])
        rw [Nat.factorization_mul (by omega) (by rw [Finset.mem_filter] at hq; exact hq.1.2.ne_zero), 
            Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd (fun h ↦ (h_q_gt_p.not_le (le_of_dvd hq_prime.pos h)).elim), add_zero]
        calc k.factorization p ≤ k := Nat.factorization_le_self k p
          _ ≤ P.L := le_trans (le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hk).2) (by linarith)
        
    calc (removed.map (·.factorization p)).sum 
      _ ≤ P.M * (big_primes.card * P.L^2) := by
          refine le_trans h_le ?_
          gcongr
          rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          calc big_primes.card * (Finset.card (Finset.Ico 1 P.L) * P.L) 
             ≤ big_primes.card * (P.L * P.L) := by gcongr; simp
             _ = big_primes.card * P.L^2 := by ring
      _ ≤ P.M * (primeCounting P.n * P.L^2) := by
          gcongr
          exact Finset.card_le_card (Finset.filter_subset _ _)
      _ = P.M * P.L^2 * primeCounting P.n := by ring

  -- Combine
  rw [h_bal_eq]
  have h_log : (Nat.log p P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
     apply le_trans (Real.log_nat_cast_le_log_div_log (by exact_mod_cast P.n.pos) hprime.one_lt)
     apply div_le_self (Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast P.n.pos))
     rw [Real.log_ge_one_iff hprime.one_lt]
     exact_mod_cast hprime.two_le
  norm_cast at h_unfiltered h_removed
  linarith
